- (22, 40) -> (22, 46): RIGHT, gray block at (22, 43) ✓
- (22, 46) -> (28, 46): DOWN, gray block at (25, 46) ✓
- (28, 46) -> (34, 46): DOWN, gray block at (31, 46) ✓

Now, the efficiency budget says I've used 17 of about 19 target actions. The path is 6 actions, which would bring the total to 23. That's over the budget. But I've already wasted many actions, so I should just execute the path now.
